name: The lost in time road.
description:
This little road seems to be ripped from a fairy tale.  Very wide, but at the
same time clean and well lighted, this road has some secret within that only
the pure ones can sense.  Maybe this leads to some special place.  At night you
can see some fireflies.  To the north you can see the temple and south of here
is where you was.

exits.description: On you way to the temple.
